description: Stores business records that belong to a single City. Business type is restricted to four allowed values.

type.validation: Only these values can be persisted/selected.

city_to_businesses.implementation: businesses.city_id is NOT NULL FK to city(id) with ON DELETE CASCADE

operations.create_business: Create at least one business per city
operations.list_businesses_for_city: Retrieve all businesses belonging to a given city_id
